nodes.label: AI as comprehensive search tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or confusing source
nodes.grounding_span: I will pull up an AI ... and then just ask it something like 'can a cotton and silk blend top go in the washing machine'

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI gets confused easily still, like if the wording is slightly off then it will misconstrue my question and give me the wrong answer

nodes.label: AI for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I will never ask AI to help me interact with customers or my colleagues in terms of how to speak to them

nodes.label: AI job displacement concern
nodes.label_negative: Human skill maintenance and job security
nodes.grounding_span: AI could just eventually cause me and a lot of others to just eventually lose our jobs

nodes.label: Customer service efficiency and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I can't afford to give customers the wrong answer as they may use this to try to get a refund

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to have authentic conversations with people

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: if we werent so reliant on having those jobs as a source of our income

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I always find it really satisfying when a customer asks me and I'm able to give them a really comprehensive answer super fast because of AI

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in interpersonal tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will never ask AI to help me interact with customers or my colleagues

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: it is quite daunting especially that AI could just eventually cause me and a lot of others to just eventually lose our jobs

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I can imagine ... that I will start to use AI more at work in the coming months/ years

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I have checked the answer alongside another search result

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
